steps.t: Bingo is saying his farewells to the hobbits of Maur Tulhau, and said he would meet you at the southern exit of the village.
Bingo is at the entrance to Maur Tulhau, in the Gloomglens. Bingo has said his good-byes and is now ready to continue his northern journey.
Bingo has passed through the blockade and is now in the Andrath, in the southern reaches of Bree-land.
Haley Meadowsweet and Theodore Gorse are now in the Andrath, in the southern reaches of Bree-land.
Bingo is now in the Andrath, in the southern reaches of Bree-land.
